description: How agents are triggered. Mechanisms include natural language detection, @-mention syntax, slash commands, CLI flags, or automatic delegation.

claude-code.mechanism: natural language (Claude auto-delegates), @agent-<name> @-mention, or --agent flag at startup for session-wide agent; 3 patterns

codex.mechanism: spawn-agent tool at LLM discretion; LLM selects role from dynamically-built role descriptions combining built-in and user-defined roles

copilot-cli.mechanism: /agent slash command, natural language instruction, auto-inference (suppressible with disable-model-invocation), or --agent flag; 4 patterns

kiro.mechanism: keyboard shortcut binding for IDE invocation; welcomeMessage shown on agent start; manual selection via agent picker

windsurf.mechanism: AGENTS.md files are always-on rule injection, not invocable agents; no manual invocation or delegation mechanism
